status.title: Deployment Status
status.subtitle: Current instance, update capabilities, and runtime health
status.unavailableHint: Check the daemon configuration on the host or run na-tools status.

operations.title: Update Operations
operations.subtitle: Every update restarts the main service. Keep this page open so the task can recover automatically.

backup.title: Backup and Restore
backup.subtitle: Create a manual backup or restore this instance from a saved backup

confirm.restartWarning: The service will restart and the WebUI may disconnect temporarily. This page will wait for the backend and resume tracking.
confirm.noBackupMessage: This Stable update will not create a backup, so it cannot rely on a new pre-update snapshot for recovery.
confirm.previewMessage: The main service will switch to the Preview channel and the daemon will create a pre-preview backup when required.
confirm.updatePreviewMessage: The current Preview channel will be updated and the daemon will create an update job.
confirm.rollbackMessage: The main service will switch to the Stable image without restoring the pre-preview data backup.
confirm.restoreTitle: Switch to Stable and restore the backup?
confirm.restoreMessage: The service will switch to Stable and restore the latest pre-preview backup. This overwrites the current data state.
confirm.manualBackupMessage: The service will stop briefly to create a consistent backup, then restart automatically.
confirm.manualRestoreMessage: This will restore {{filename}}, overwrite the current data, and start the service afterwards.

job.title: Job Status
job.noActiveTask: There is no active deployment job
job.succeededHint: The update completed. Refresh deployment status to confirm the current channel and health.

phaseDescription.validate_instance: Checking the instance, Docker, and Compose
phaseDescription.restart_services: Restarting services; the connection may be interrupted
phaseDescription.verify: Waiting for the application to become healthy

recovery.waiting: The connection was interrupted. This does not mean the job failed. Waiting for Nekro Agent to recover.
recovery.jobMissing: The job was not found after the backend recovered. Check daemon logs on the host or run na-tools status.

logs.title: Live Logs
logs.lineCount: Showing the latest {{count}} lines, up to 750 lines

errors.NetworkError: The service is temporarily unreachable; waiting for recovery
errors.UnknownError: The request failed. Try again shortly.
errors.unknown: The request failed. Try again shortly.
errors.daemon_instance_missing: Daemon instance binding is missing. Run na-tools bind again.
errors.daemon_token_missing: The daemon token is missing. Run na-tools bind again or check the daemon configuration.
errors.stream_disconnected: The live connection was interrupted; waiting for the service to recover
errors.job_conflict: Another update job is already running
errors.job_not_found: The deployment job was not found
errors.invalid_backup_name: Backup names may only contain letters, numbers, dot, underscore, and dash
errors.docker_unavailable: Docker or Docker Compose is unavailable
errors.unsupported_operation: The current daemon does not support this operation
